---
name: Data question or correction
about: Challenge a number, report a wrong row, or flag a stale entry
title: "[data] <row id>"
labels: data-question
---

## Which row

- **Row id**: <!-- e.g. oat-milk-oatly-64oz -->
- **Field in question**: <!-- e.g. plastic_grams, primary_material -->

## What's wrong

<!-- What you think the current value should be, and why. -->

## Evidence

<!-- A measurement you took, a manufacturer datasheet, a published study,
or a packaging redesign announcement. Links welcome. -->

## Would you be willing to submit a PR with the corrected row?

<!-- Yes / No - either is fine. -->
